resources.string: Temperature %1$s a fen tori om we ukukun %2$s
Ourour: Ika ka äeä ewe minen älillis asan, epwe tongeni mwittir äeämwäälli om battery lap seni fansoun meinisin
Ika kopwe tongeni: URL mi kefilita
Ewe URL ese set, ika ese wor. Ka tongeni tonong non ekkewe setting pwe kopwe apachanong ew URL mi kefinita
Ewe %1$s URL ese wor masowan, kose mochen cheki omw ewe %2$s file me sotuni sefan
Kopwe angei meinisin ekkewe Data me kopwe suki
Ese tongeni an epwe ririfengenni ewe %1$s ren ewe %2$s
Ese tongeni angang won ekkewe pisekin pwarata
Ese pwung an epwe fori ewe porausen fansoun seni noumw we server, awewe chok ren ewe porausen %1$s
Widget mi fiti ewe mwichen chon fiti
Ewe sokkun porous ’%1$s’ ese pwung, cheki om kewe setting me sotuni sefan
URL ren pworaus ese fis, kopwe fis lon %1$s
Ngang upwe Fichi me Sotuni Sefan
Ei app a fen siwin nge ewe server ka fiti ese siwin ewe Inigo Plugin ren weeWX. Ekkewe field mei tongeni esapw pwano non napanap mei pwung tori ewe weeWX epwe niwinsefan
Ewe fansoun awenewen ese pwung, awenewena ekkewe setting me mwirin sotuni sefani
Ewe %1$s iei a mochen ew %2$s taropwen data seni ewe %3$s server, mi namwot kopwe awenewena ewe %4$s me awenewena ewe %5$s me mwen ei app epwe angangoch. Klik Ok ren pwan ekkoch poraus won %6$s
Ekkewe Statistics non ewe Maram a no
Ekkewe Pworaus lon ewe Ier a Lo
Kopwe awenewena ren poum, kopwe suki ewe screen pwe kopwe tongeni load
Temperature %1$s a fen tori om we ukukun %2$s
Ekkewe mettoch mi fis lon ewe maram mwirin?
Ese wor eú minen álillis are app ese fen fis
Mi namwot epwe wor esinesin pwe epwe esinesin ngonuk nupwen pwichikar, ran ika ran a tori ekkewe ukukun ka fen finata
Pokiten ka ú ngeni ewe mumutáán esinesin fán ruu, mi lamot kopwe tongeni féri ena lón ekkewe setting nge, kopwe poputááni setting?
Kopwe witiwit nupwen sipwe verify ewe URL ka tinato

plurals.name: processing_errors2
plurals.item: Mei wor %1$d tipis ra kuna nupwen ka fori sefani, nengeni %2$s logs ren ekkewe pisekin pwarata
Mei wor %1$d tipis ra kuna nupwen ka fori sefani, nengeni %2$s logs ren ekkewe pisekin pwarata
A wor %1$d tipis a fis nupwen ka awenewena, nengeni %2$s logs ren ekkewe poraus
Mei wor %1$d tipis ra kuna nupwen ka fori sefani, nengeni %2$s logs ren ekkewe pisekin pwarata
Mei wor %1$d tipis ra kuna nupwen ka fori sefani, nengeni %2$s logs ren ekkewe pisekin pwarata
Mei wor %1$d tipis ra kuna nupwen ka fori sefani, nengeni %2$s logs ren ekkewe pisekin pwarata

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: A wor %1$d tipis a pwa non ewe %2$s, nengeni ewe %2$s a nom non %3$s ika nengeni ekkewe %4$s logs ren ekkewe pisekin pwarata
A wor %1$d tipis a pwa non ewe %2$s, nengeni ewe %2$s a nom non %3$s ika nengeni ekkewe %4$s logs ren ekkewe pisekin pwarata
A wor %1$d tipis a pwa non ewe %2$s, nengeni ewe %2$s a nom non %3$s ika nengeni ekkewe %4$s logs ren ekkewe pisekin pwarata
A wor %1$d tipis a pwa non ewe %2$s, nengeni ewe %2$s a nom non %3$s ika nengeni ekkewe %4$s logs ren ekkewe pisekin pwarata
A wor %1$d tipis a pwa non ewe %2$s, nengeni ewe %2$s a nom non %3$s ika nengeni ekkewe %4$s logs ren ekkewe pisekin pwarata
A wor %1$d tipis a pwa non ewe %2$s, nengeni ewe %2$s a nom non %3$s ika nengeni ekkewe %4$s logs ren ekkewe pisekin pwarata

resources.string: Ese tongeni angei ewe sasingin radar
Ewe sasingin radar a chuen fis
Ewe sokkun radar ’%1$s’ ese pwung, cheki om kewe setting me sotuni sefan
Radar URL ese fis. Ka tongeni feilo ngeni ekkewe setting pwe kopwe siwili
A ouroura ngonuk iteiten ran ika ewe ran a tori ewe ukukun ka fen finata
Rain %1$s a fen fiti ewe ukukun %2$s
Ekkewe Alertin Rain mi fokkun watte?
Alerts ika pwe ewe ukukun ran a nap seni ewe ukukun watte anongonong won ukukun fansoun ran
Ewe ukukun ran %1$s non ewe %2$d %3$s a no a tori ewe ’Severe’
Alerts ika pwe ewe ukukun ran a nap seni ewe ukukun ourour anongonong won ukukun fansoun ran
Ewe ukukun ran %1$s non ewe %2$d %3$s a no a tori ewe nenien ’Ourour’
Alerts ika pwe ewe ukukun ran a nap seni ewe ukukun watch anongonong won ukukun fansoun ran
Rain %1$s non ewe %2$d %3$s a no a tori ewe nenien ’Nengeni’
Ka fen nukuw pwe ka mochen kopwe angei meinisin ekkewe data?
A chúen angei ekkewe pwóróus usun mwachkkan
A chúen angei ekkewe pwóróus usun ewe fansoun
Alerts tori fan ruu iteiten ran nupwen ewe pwichikar a tori ewe ukukun ka fen finata
Ese fat och tipis a fis
Seti ngeni ekkewe minefo mi manual, nge ese wor poraus mi cache iei
URL a fen set ngeni ewe nenien asoso ika ese wor
Kopwe aea ekkewe fansoun update mi pwung
Ese tongeni fiti ika angei seni ewe URL mi affat
Ese tongeni fiti are angei ewe pworaus
Ese tongeni an epwe fiti ika angei %1$s seni %2$s
Ese tongeni an epwe fiti ika angei seni %1$s
Ese tongeni fiti ika angei radar= sasing seni ewe internet
Ese tongeni kopwe fiti are angei ekkewe setting seni noum we server
Ese tongeni kopwe fiti ika angei ew sasingin webcam seni om we server
Ewe sasingin webcam a chúen chék chéúfetál
Ewe URL seni ewe webcam ese setiw ika ese wor masowan
Epwe fen siwin nge ese wor Wi-Fi
